title: PromptQL Tag – The company-wide AI agent for Slack
abstract: PromptQL Tag is a company-wide AI agent that streamlines knowledge sharing and automation across teams, empowering employees with instant access to relevant information and enhancing productivity through intelligent prompts.
abstract_zh: 哎呀，这玩意儿简直是我工作台上的救星！以前资料散落在各个角落，找起来就像大海捞针一样，现在有了PromptQL Tag这个AI小帮手，我随时随地都能找到需要的信息，还能一键触发智能提示加速工作效率，简直是办公室里的贴心小秘书，再也不用担心信息不对称啦！
